title: Corpus Hermeticum XI: Mind to Hermes
description: Mind itself speaks to Hermes about the nature of God, the cosmos, and the speed of thought.
introduction: Mind itself speaks to Hermes about the nature of God, the cosmos, and the speed of thought.

translation.text: Command your soul to go to India, and it will be there faster than your command. Command it to go to the ocean, and there too it is already.
